TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Donkuan ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Banrong go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 151 buwan, 553 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 98% kyan ku 541 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 2% kyan ku 12 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 83%, Amis 3%, Tayan 1%, Truku 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 10%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Donkuan hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Donkuan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Donkuan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Donkuan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Donkuan hya' ga Damayan. tay mkyahu' na Donkuan hya' ga Ihownang. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Donkuan ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Donkuan ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ *onkuan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu βanroŋ ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, βunun **%, amis~ɕ *%, tajan *%, truku *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli **%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na *onkuan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na *onkuan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na *onkuan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na *onkuan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na *onkuan ħjaʔ ɣa *amajan. taj mkjaħuʔ na *onkuan ħjaʔ ɣa iħownaŋ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ *onkuan ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ *onkuan ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Donkuan ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Banrong go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 151 buwan, 553 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 98% kyan ku 541 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 2% kyan ku 12 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 83%, Amis 3%, Tayan 1%, Truku 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 10%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Donkuan hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Donkuan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Donkuan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Donkuan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Donkuan hya' ga Damayan. tay mkyahu' na Donkuan hya' ga Ihownang. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Donkuan ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Donkuan ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ *onkuan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu βanroŋ ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, βunun **%, amis~ɕ *%, tajan *%, truku *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli **%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na *onkuan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na *onkuan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na *onkuan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na *onkuan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na *onkuan ħjaʔ ɣa *amajan. taj mkjaħuʔ na *onkuan ħjaʔ ɣa iħownaŋ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ *onkuan ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ *onkuan ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
